♟ Insert Chess Board

🎨 Board Editor

Set up any position. White pieces go on bottom by default. Right-click a square to remove a piece.

FEN:

📚 GM Games Library

Annotated master games. Click Open in Analysis to study any game — variations, comments, and annotations will load automatically.

⚠️ Heavily annotated games may take a moment to load. Some games with complex formatting may not load all moves — if this happens, try pasting the PGN directly into the Analysis board.

💡 Our Mission

♛

Chess for Everyone

Chess64 was built with a single mission: to make beautiful, feature-rich chess available to everyone, completely free. No paywalls. No ads. No accounts required. Just chess.

📚

Open & Free

Every feature is free. No premium tiers, no upgrade prompts. We believe chess education and tools should be accessible to all players regardless of budget.

🎓

Learn & Improve

From opening theory to endgame technique, our goal is to help every player improve — whether you're a complete beginner or an experienced tournament player.

🔥

Passion Project

Chess64 is built by chess enthusiasts, for chess enthusiasts. Every feature is designed with love for the game and respect for its 1,500-year history.

🚀

Always Improving

We constantly add features, fix bugs, and improve based on player feedback. Your suggestions directly shape Chess64's future.

🙏 Thanks & Attributions

Chess64 is made possible by these incredible open-source projects and APIs:

⚡
Stockfish
The world's strongest open-source chess engine, used for analysis, AI opponents, and position evaluation.
👋
Lichess
Free and open-source chess for everyone. Chess64 uses Lichess's public broadcast API to display upcoming and live chess events on the Events page. Lichess is a non-profit and we love them for it.
♔
Chess.com
Player profiles, ratings, leaderboards, and game archives provided through the Chess.com public API.
📷
Wikimedia Commons / CBurnett
The beautiful chess piece images are the CBurnett piece set, released under Creative Commons license by Colin M.L. Burnett.
🌐
2700chess.com
Live top-player ratings banner displayed on the Notable Players page. A great resource for following elite chess.
🔥
Firebase / Google
Authentication, real-time database, and infrastructure powering all user accounts, online games, chat, community features, and cloud sync.
🎵
Apple / iTunes Search API
Song search and 30-second preview clips provided free via Apple's iTunes Search API, powering the Chess64 music player feature.

💌 Support Chess64

The best way to support Chess64 is to share it with fellow chess players and send feedback!

♟ Chess64 Terms of Service

Last updated: 2025

By creating an account or using Chess64, you agree to the following terms:

1. Account Use
Chess64 accounts are provided as a free service. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account at any time, for any reason, with or without notice. This includes abuse, harassment, cheating, or any behavior deemed harmful to the community.

2. No Warranties
Chess64 is provided "as is" without any warranty. We do not guarantee uninterrupted service, data preservation, or accuracy of any content.

3. Limitation of Liability
Chess64 and its operators are not responsible for any loss of data, progress, or damages arising from your use of this service. Your use of Chess64 is entirely at your own risk.

4. Content
You are responsible for all content you publish. We reserve the right to remove any content without notice.

5. Privacy
We collect minimal data (email, display name, game stats) solely to operate the service. We do not sell your data.

6. Changes
These terms may change at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance of revised terms.

By creating an account you confirm you are at least 13 years old and agree to these terms.
